stats_fallback.christened: 2021-11-18 (Ocean Cay MSC Marine Reserve, Bahamas; godmother Sophia Loren; first-ever ship naming ceremony held on a private island; live performance by Nile Rodgers and Chic)
stats_fallback.cabins_note: 2,270 total; 71 MSC Yacht Club cabins including six two-bedroom suites.
stats_fallback.beam: 135 ft (41 m waterline; 50 m max extreme breadth)
stats_fallback.yacht_club_status: Installed from 2021 delivery — MSC Seashore was the first MSC ship with the enhanced Yacht Club configuration (71 cabins including six two-bedroom suites). Forward enclave with Concierge Area and Top Sail Lounge (Deck 16), MSC Yacht Club Restaurant (Deck 18), private sundeck (Deck 20) with The One Pool and MSC Yacht Club Grill & Bar. 24-hour butler service and private access to MSC Aurea Spa section.
stats_fallback.environmental: RINA Sustainable Ship and Biosafe Ship notations; hybrid exhaust gas cleaning with ~98% SOx reduction; SCR with ~90% NOx reduction (Fincantieri delivery press release).

related.class_notes: Seaside EVO Class. MSC Seashore is the lead ship; her only sister is MSC Seascape (2022). The Seaside EVO class is an enlarged evolution of the original Seaside Class (MSC Seaside 2017 + MSC Seaview 2018 — parent class, not EVO sisters). The EVO pair are 170,412 GT on 339 m hulls. Each sister uses a different interior theme: Seashore's is New York (Central Park, Tribeca, 5th Avenue, Manhattan MDRs; Madison Theater; Brooklyn Café; Long Island Pool and Bar).

deployment.current_status: In first statutory drydock at Grand Bahama Shipyard, Freeport, Bahamas. Arrived 1 April 2026. AIS position 11 April 2026 04:07 UTC: moored at 26.52898° N / 78.75857° W, 0 knots.
deployment.drydock_scope: Classification/safety work, hull cleaning and paint, minor interior updates.
deployment.return_to_service: 19 April 2026 — 7-night Western Caribbean round-trip from Port Canaveral calling at Nassau, Ocean Cay, Cozumel, Costa Maya.
deployment.2026_homeport: Port Canaveral, Florida — year-round 3- to 7-night Caribbean round-trips.
deployment.2027_28_transition: Miami homeport for winter 2027-28 per MSC 2027-28 deployment announcement. MSC Grandiosa takes over Port Canaveral rotation for 2027-28.

history.float_out: 20 August 2020, Fincantieri Monfalcone (delayed about two months by COVID-era yard restrictions)
history.maiden_voyage: 1 August 2021 from Barcelona — 7-night Western Mediterranean (Barcelona, Marseille, Genoa, Naples, Messina, Valletta)
history.christened: 18 November 2021, Ocean Cay MSC Marine Reserve, Bahamas (Sophia Loren — her 16th MSC ship christening; first-ever ship naming ceremony held on a private island; live performance by Nile Rodgers and Chic)
history.first_statutory_drydock: 1-18 April 2026 at Grand Bahama Shipyard, Freeport, Bahamas
history.class_position: Lead (first) Seaside EVO-class ship; third hull overall in the broader 4-ship Seaside family

discrepancies_flagged.length: VesselFinder alone reports 311.74 m, which is incorrect. All other sources (Fincantieri delivery press release, CruiseMapper, MyShipTracking, VesselTracker, MagicPort, Cruise Industry News, MSC press) report 339 m. Use 339 m.
discrepancies_flagged.beam: 41 m waterline (CruiseMapper, VesselFinder, Maritime Database) vs 50 m max extreme breadth (VesselTracker, MyShipTracking, MagicPort). Both are correct for different fields. Use 41 m as primary.
discrepancies_flagged.mmsi: 215920000 (Malta MID 215) verified by VesselFinder, VesselTracker, MyShipTracking, Maritime Database, MagicPort. CruiseMapper lists a stale Italian-MID MMSI 247435200 — likely pre-delivery provisional registration. Use 215920000.
discrepancies_flagged.madison_theater_spelling: The MSC ship map PDF uses both 'Madison Theater' (5x) and 'Madison Theatre' (2x) in the same document. Press releases overwhelmingly use 'Madison Theater'. Use Madison Theater.
discrepancies_flagged.pdf_typo: The MSC Seashore official PDF contains one 'SEASCAPE RECEPTION-GUEST SERVICE' label as a graphic designer's template artifact from the sister ship; all other labels, metadata, yard number, and venue list correctly identify Seashore.
discrepancies_flagged.user_premise_correction: There was NO second christening in Miami and NO first christening in Trieste. MSC Seashore had one ceremonial delivery at Fincantieri Monfalcone on 26 July 2021 (not a christening, just a technical handover) and one christening ceremony at Ocean Cay MSC Marine Reserve on 18 November 2021.
discrepancies_flagged.alaska_claim: A search blurb suggested an Alaska deployment — unsourced and contradicts all primary MSC/CIN statements. Ignore. MSC Seashore is year-round Caribbean through 2026-27 season.
